title: 100 Doors Puzzle Box
description: 100 Doors Puzzle Box is a challenging escape game with mathematical puzzles. Solve numerical riddles and unlock doors to progress through 100 unique levels!

howToPlay: 100 Doors Puzzle Box is a point-and-click game packed with intriguing puzzles and hidden object challenges. Test your skills as you navigate through nine captivating, animated levels. Engage in unique mechanics like time travel, object combination, and creative problem-solving as you unlock each door and collect achievements. Dive into beautifully detailed locations and unravel the mysteries behind each level!

controls.mouse: Use the left mouse button to play.

Practice to improve your skills

title: AimAndShoot
description: AimAndShoot is an open-source strategy shooting game where students practice angle estimation, timing, prediction, and cause-and-effect reasoning through fast browser rounds.

howToPlay: Open AimAndShoot and start from the game screen.
Use the available keyboard, mouse, or touch controls to complete each challenge.
Focus on computational thinking while improving your score.

controls.keyboard: Use arrow keys, WASD, Enter, Space, or the controls shown in the game.
controls.mouse: Click, drag, or select items inside the game area when supported.
controls.touch: Tap and swipe on mobile devices when the game supports touch input.

tips: Play one practice round before aiming for a high score.
Watch patterns carefully and adjust your strategy after each attempt.
Take short breaks between rounds to keep focus sharp.

title: Alchemy
description: Alchemy is a classic element-combining puzzle game where you discover new materials by mixing basic elements. Start with earth, air, fire, and water, then combine them to create hundreds of different items, from simple tools to complex life forms. Explore the world of scientific discovery through experimentation!

howToPlay: Start with four basic elements: earth, air, fire, and water
Drag and drop elements onto each other to combine them
Use logic and creativity to find new combinations
Unlock all possible elements to complete the game

controls.mouse: Drag and drop elements to combine them
controls.interface: Click on discovered elements to use them in new combinations

tips: Think logically about how real-world elements might combine
Some combinations require multiple steps to achieve
Keep track of what you've already discovered
Experiment with unusual combinations - some might surprise you
Use hints if you get stuck on finding new elements

title: Alchemy Merge Clicker
description: Alchemy Merge Clicker is an addictive incremental game where you combine elements to create new materials and discover the secrets of alchemy. Start with basic elements and work your way up to creating rare and powerful substances through strategic merging and clicking!

howToPlay: Click to generate basic alchemical elements
Merge identical elements to create more powerful ones
Unlock new element types as you progress
Purchase upgrades to increase production speed
Discover rare combinations and unlock achievements

controls.mouse: Click to generate elements and interact with the interface
controls.drag: Drag elements to merge them together

tips: Focus on upgrading your click power early
Merge elements strategically to unlock new types
Invest in automatic generators for passive income
Experiment with different element combinations
Save up for expensive upgrades that provide big boosts

title: Animal DNA Run
description: Animal DNA Run is an exciting runner game that teaches genetics and biology. Collect DNA sequences to transform into different animals while learning about genetic codes and evolution!

howToPlay: Transform into different animals based on collected DNA
Learn about genetic codes and heredity principles
Explore the diversity of the animal kingdom

controls.mouse: Move mouse left and right to control character direction
controls.keyboard: Use arrow keys or WASD to control movement
controls.touch: Swipe screen to control character movement

tips: Collect same-colored DNA for better transformations
Different animals have different special abilities
Learn the patterns of DNA sequence combinations
Observe relationships between animal traits and genes
Try to collect rare genetic combinations

title: BFF Math Class
description: BFF Math Class is a social learning game where best friends help each other solve mathematical problems. Work together to complete math challenges and strengthen your friendship!

howToPlay: BFF Math Class is a dress-up game, your task is to assist the girl in getting ready for her math class. You'll need to prepare her bag and create the perfect look. There's a wide selection of hairstyles, outfits, and accessories to choose from, allowing you to create a fashionable and stylish appearance for her. Your goal is to make sure she looks cool at school by selecting the trendiest outfits available. Additionally, you'll need to help her complete all her math exercises, combining your fashion stylist skills with some math problem-solving to ensure she's fully prepared for class. Enjoy the game and have fun dressing up the character while sharpening your math skills!

controls.mouse: Use the left mouse button to interact with in-game UI.

tips: Read the game instructions carefully
Practice to improve your skills

title: Block Puzzle Master
description: Block Puzzle Master is a classic block-fitting puzzle game. Drag and drop blocks to fill rows and columns, developing spatial awareness and strategic thinking skills!

howToPlay: Select blocks from the bottom panel
Drag and place them on the 10x10 grid
Fill complete rows or columns to clear them
Score points for each cleared line
Game ends when no more blocks can be placed

controls.mouse: Click and drag blocks to place them on the grid
controls.touch: Touch and drag blocks to position them on mobile

tips: Always try to clear multiple lines at once
Keep the center of the grid as open as possible
Save room for larger L-shaped and T-shaped blocks
Don't fill corners unless you can clear them immediately
Plan several moves ahead for better scores

title: Blockbuster Puzzle
description: Blockbuster Puzzle is an exciting block-matching game that challenges your spatial reasoning. Arrange and fit different shaped blocks to clear lines and achieve high scores!

howToPlay: Drag and drop blocks onto the game grid
Fill complete rows or columns to clear them
Fit blocks strategically to maximize space
Clear multiple lines simultaneously for bonus points
Continue until no more blocks can be placed

controls.mouse: Drag blocks from the bottom panel to the grid
controls.touch: Touch and drag blocks to place them on mobile

tips: Always look for opportunities to clear multiple lines
Keep the grid as clear as possible
Save space for larger, oddly-shaped blocks
Plan ahead by checking upcoming block shapes
Focus on corners and edges to maintain flexibility

title: Box It Up
description: Box It Up is a spatial puzzle game where you pack items efficiently into boxes. Develop organizational skills and spatial reasoning while solving increasingly complex packing challenges!

howToPlay: Drag items from the inventory into the box
Rotate pieces to fit them in different orientations
Pack all items efficiently without overlapping
Use every bit of space to achieve perfect packing
Complete levels by fitting all items in the box

controls.mouse: Drag items to move, right-click to rotate
controls.keyboard: Use R key to rotate selected items
controls.touch: Drag to move, double-tap to rotate on mobile

tips: Start with the largest items first
Try different orientations for better fit
Look for shapes that complement each other
Don't leave small gaps that can't be filled
Plan ahead before placing each item

title: Cake Sort Puzzle 3D
description: Cake Sort Puzzle 3D is a delightful 3D sorting game that combines creativity with problem-solving. Sort colorful cake layers to create beautiful, uniform cakes while developing spatial reasoning and color recognition skills!

howToPlay: Drag and drop cake layers to sort them by color
Create uniform cakes with all layers the same color
Use 3D perspective to plan your sorting strategy
Complete each level with the fewest moves possible
Unlock new cake designs and decorations

controls.mouse: Click and drag to move cake layers between plates
controls.touch: Touch and drag on mobile devices to sort cakes

tips: Visualize the final arrangement before starting
Work with one color at a time for efficiency
Use empty plates as temporary storage
Consider the 3D perspective when planning moves
Practice spatial reasoning to improve sorting speed

title: Car Painting Simulator
description: Car Painting Simulator is an automotive design game that teaches vehicle customization and painting techniques. Design unique car paint jobs, learn about automotive aesthetics, and express creativity through vehicle art!

howToPlay: Select a car model to customize and paint
Choose colors, patterns, and design elements
Apply paint using realistic painting tools
Add decals, stripes, and artistic details

controls.mouse: Use mouse to paint and apply designs to cars
controls.tools: Select different paint brushes and spray tools

tips: Plan your design before starting to paint
Use primer and base coats for better results
Apply thin, even coats for smooth finishes
Consider the car's shape when designing patterns
Study real automotive paint schemes for inspiration

title: City Blocks
description: City Blocks is an urban planning puzzle game where you build a city by placing building blocks strategically. Learn about city planning and spatial organization while creating the perfect metropolis!

howToPlay: Place building blocks on the city grid
Create complete rows or columns to clear them
Build different types of city structures
Plan your city layout for maximum efficiency
Score points for completed city blocks

controls.mouse: Drag building blocks onto the city grid
controls.touch: Touch and drag blocks to place them on mobile

tips: Balance residential, commercial, and industrial areas
Leave space for roads and infrastructure
Clear completed blocks to make room for new buildings
Think about real city planning principles
Create a functional and beautiful cityscape

title: Coffee Match Block Puzzle
description: Coffee Match Block Puzzle combines the relaxing theme of coffee with engaging block puzzle mechanics. Fit coffee-themed blocks together while enjoying a cozy café atmosphere!

howToPlay: Drag coffee-themed blocks onto the grid
Fill complete rows or columns to clear them
Match coffee cups, beans, and café items
Create combos by clearing multiple lines
Enjoy the relaxing coffee shop atmosphere

controls.mouse: Drag blocks from the selection area to the grid
controls.touch: Touch and drag blocks to place them on mobile

tips: Start with the largest blocks first
Keep corners clear for small blocks
Look for opportunities to clear multiple lines
Coffee-themed blocks have special bonus effects
Take your time and enjoy the relaxing gameplay

title: Color Match AMG
description: Color Match AMG is a creative color-matching game that helps develop color recognition and artistic skills. Match colors precisely and create beautiful patterns while learning about color theory and visual design!

howToPlay: Mix primary colors to create the exact match
Use the color wheel to understand color relationships
Progress through increasingly challenging color combinations

controls.mouse: Click and drag to mix colors and create matches
controls.colorWheel: Use the color wheel to select precise colors

tips: Learn basic color theory: red + blue = purple
Practice mixing primary colors (red, blue, yellow)
Observe how adding white or black changes brightness
Pay attention to color temperature (warm vs cool)
Use small adjustments for precise color matching

title: Cookie Hangman
description: Cookie Hangman is a sweet twist on the classic hangman game! Guess the word before the cookie crumbles. A delicious way to practice vocabulary and spelling!

howToPlay: Guess letters to reveal the hidden word
Click on alphabet letters to make guesses
Correct guesses reveal letters in the word
Wrong guesses make the cookie crumble
Solve the word before the cookie is gone

controls.mouse: Click on letters to guess them
controls.keyboard: Type letters to make guesses
controls.touch: Touch letters on mobile devices

tips: Start with common vowels (A, E, I, O, U)
Try common consonants (R, S, T, L, N)
Think about word length and category
Use context clues if available
Be strategic with your letter choices

title: Count Masters: Stickman Games
description: Count Masters: Stickman Games is a fast-paced running game where you gather a growing army of stickmen to clash against rival crowds. Navigate through obstacles, choose the best paths to multiply your numbers, and lead your team to victory. Battle fierce opponents, defeat the King-stickman, and claim the castle in an action-packed race filled with strategy and excitement!

howToPlay: Fast-paced 3D runner with epic crowd battles
Fun strategy and math choices with every gate
Colorful, satisfying visuals and smooth controls

controls.mouse: Mouse = Move the character by moving the mouse left or right. Left-click to select buttons.
controls.keyboard: Keyboard = Use the left and right arrow keys to move. Press space to select actions.

tips: Don't just rush forward—choose gates that give you the best numbers, even if they're not directly in your path.
Avoid red gates and dangerous traps that shrink your army.
Upgrade your starting crowd and gate bonuses early to grow faster in each run.
Watch enemy movements and time your attacks—charging in blindly can cost your entire team.
Save coins between runs to boost your strength and make harder levels easier.

title: Crossword
description: Crossword is a classic word puzzle game! Fill in the grid by solving clues across and down. Challenge your vocabulary and general knowledge skills.

howToPlay: Read the clues for across and down answers
Click on a numbered square to start entering letters
Type your answer using the keyboard
Use crossing letters to help solve other clues
Complete the entire grid to finish the puzzle

controls.mouse: Click on squares to select them
controls.keyboard: Type letters to fill in answers
controls.touch: Touch squares and use on-screen keyboard

tips: Start with clues you're confident about
Use crossing letters as hints for other words
Think about synonyms and wordplay in clues
Short words are often easier to solve first
Don't be afraid to guess and adjust

title: Crossword Connect
description: Crossword Connect combines word search with crossword puzzles! Connect letters to form words and fill the crossword grid in this innovative word game.

howToPlay: Look at the available letters at the bottom
Connect letters by swiping to form words
Place words in the crossword grid
Fill all squares to complete the level
Use hints when you need help finding words

controls.mouse: Click and drag to connect letters
controls.touch: Swipe to connect letters on mobile devices

tips: Start with longer words for more letter clues
Look for common prefixes and suffixes
Use crossing letters to help form new words
Try different letter combinations
Save hints for the most challenging levels

title: Cryptoword
description: Cryptoword is a challenging word puzzle game where you decode encrypted messages! Use logic and language skills to crack the code and reveal hidden words and phrases.

howToPlay: Use frequency analysis to identify common letters
Fill in the decoded letters throughout the puzzle
Complete the entire message to win

controls.mouse: Click on letters to enter your guesses
controls.keyboard: Type letters to decode the message
controls.touch: Touch letters on mobile devices

tips: Look for single-letter words (A, I)
Common three-letter words are good starting points
Pay attention to letter frequency patterns
Use context clues from partially decoded words
E is the most common letter in English

title: Cups - Water Sort Puzzle
description: Cups - Water Sort Puzzle is a relaxing color-sorting game that combines logical thinking with visual aesthetics. Pour colored water between cups to sort all colors correctly and create beautiful color arrangements!

howToPlay: Tap a cup to pour water into another cup
Sort all colors so each cup contains only one color
Water can only be poured on the same color or empty space
Use strategy to avoid getting stuck
Complete each level with minimum moves for better scores

controls.mouse: Click on cups to select and pour water
controls.touch: Tap cups on mobile devices to pour water

tips: Start with colors that have the most pieces
Plan several moves ahead to avoid dead ends
Use empty cups strategically as temporary storage
Don't rush - think about the best sequence
Some levels require specific pouring orders

title: Cut the Rope
description: Cut the Rope is a delightful physics puzzle game! Help Om Nom, the cute green monster, get his candy by cutting ropes, collecting stars, and solving clever puzzles.

howToPlay: Cut the ropes to drop the candy to Om Nom
Collect all three stars in each level for maximum points
Use bubbles, spikes, and other objects to guide the candy
Time your cuts carefully to solve each puzzle
Complete levels to unlock new challenges

controls.mouse: Click and drag to cut ropes
controls.touch: Swipe to cut ropes on mobile devices

tips: Study the level layout before making your first cut
Use physics to your advantage - swing the candy
Some levels require multiple cuts in sequence
Collect stars for higher scores and achievements
Experiment with different cutting strategies

title: Cypher - Code Breaker
description: Cypher - Code Breaker is a brain-teasing logic game where you decipher hidden digits using clever clues and formulas. Each symbol masks a number, and your job is to reveal the correct combination without guessing. Inspired by classics like Sudoku and Mastermind, this puzzle challenges you to think critically and find the one true solution.

title: Dicetris
description: Dicetris combines Tetris gameplay with dice mathematics. Stack dice blocks while calculating sums and creating mathematical combinations in this unique puzzle game!

howToPlay: Dicetris is a clever block-stacking puzzle game that challenges your math and strategy skills. Align falling dice to match the target sums at the bottom, using color combinations and stacking techniques to maximize your score. With each move, you'll sharpen your thinking while chasing high scores in this engaging and unique puzzle experience.

controls.keyboard: You can also play with the WASD keys.

tips: Read the game instructions carefully
Practice to improve your skills

title: Doodlr.io
description: Doodlr.io is a collaborative drawing and art creation game where players can create artwork together in real-time. Express creativity, learn from other artists, and participate in shared artistic projects!

howToPlay: Join drawing rooms with other players
Collaborate on shared canvases in real-time
Use various drawing tools and colors
Participate in drawing challenges and themes

controls.mouse: Use mouse to draw and paint on the canvas
controls.tools: Select different brushes, shapes, and colors
controls.chat: Communicate with other artists via chat

tips: Respect other artists' work when collaborating
Experiment with different drawing techniques
Learn from observing other players' methods
Participate in themed drawing challenges
Be creative and have fun with artistic expression

title: Draw Climber
description: Draw Climber is a creative physics game! Draw legs for your character to help them climb over obstacles and reach the finish line. Be creative with your designs!

howToPlay: Draw legs for your character using mouse or touch
Watch your character move with the legs you've drawn
Redraw legs when facing different obstacles
Adapt your leg design to overcome various challenges
Race against opponents to reach the finish line first

controls.mouse: Click and drag to draw legs for your character
controls.touch: Touch and draw legs on mobile devices

tips: Different obstacles require different leg shapes
Longer legs help with tall obstacles
Wider legs provide better stability
Experiment with creative leg designs
Redraw quickly when obstacles change

title: Drop Merge the Numbers
description: Drop Merge the Numbers is an engaging math puzzle game where you drop number blocks and merge them to create larger numbers. Combine identical numbers to reach the highest score possible!

howToPlay: Drop number blocks from the top of the screen
Merge identical numbers to create larger numbers
Plan your moves to create chain reactions

controls.mouse: Click to drop number blocks
controls.keyboard: Use arrow keys for precise placement

tips: Plan ahead to create bigger merges
Try to set up chain reactions for bonus points
Keep the board organized to avoid filling up

title: Elemental One
description: Elemental One is an open-source platform game where students practice timing, movement planning, persistence, and spatial reasoning through compact browser levels.

howToPlay: Open Elemental One and start from the game screen.
Use the available keyboard, mouse, or touch controls to complete each challenge.
Focus on planning and persistence while improving your score.

controls.keyboard: Use arrow keys, WASD, Enter, Space, or the controls shown in the game.
controls.mouse: Click, drag, or select items inside the game area when supported.
controls.touch: Tap and swipe on mobile devices when the game supports touch input.

tips: Play one practice round before aiming for a high score.
Watch patterns carefully and adjust your strategy after each attempt.
Take short breaks between rounds to keep focus sharp.

title: Emoji Puzzle
description: Emoji Puzzle is a fun word guessing game using emojis! Decode the emoji combinations to guess movies, songs, phrases, and more. Test your emoji knowledge!

howToPlay: Look at the emoji combination presented
Think about what the emojis represent together
Type your guess for the movie, song, or phrase
Use hints if you're stuck on a puzzle
Progress through increasingly challenging emoji combinations

controls.keyboard: Type your guesses using the keyboard
controls.mouse: Click on hint buttons when needed
controls.touch: Use on-screen keyboard on mobile devices

tips: Think about literal and figurative meanings
Consider popular culture references
Look for word play and puns in emoji combinations
Break down complex emoji sequences
Use hints sparingly to challenge yourself

title: Fill the Fridge
description: Fill the Fridge is a satisfying organization puzzle where you pack groceries and food items efficiently into a refrigerator. Learn about organization and spatial planning!

howToPlay: Drag food items from the counter into the fridge
Rotate items to fit them in the best orientation
Pack everything efficiently without wasting space
Fill the entire fridge to complete each level

controls.mouse: Drag items to move, right-click to rotate
controls.touch: Drag to move items, double-tap to rotate on mobile

tips: Start with larger items like milk cartons and juice boxes
Keep frozen items in the freezer section
Group fruits and vegetables together
Use door compartments for smaller items
Think about real-life fridge organization

title: Find the Difference
description: Find the Difference is a classic observation puzzle game. Compare two similar images and spot all the differences. Improve your attention to detail and visual perception skills!

howToPlay: Look at two seemingly identical pictures side by side
Click on areas where you spot differences
Find all differences to complete each level
Use hints if you get stuck on difficult spots
Work quickly for bonus points and stars

controls.mouse: Click on differences you spot between the images
controls.touch: Tap on differences you find on mobile devices

tips: Scan systematically from left to right
Look for differences in colors, shapes, and objects
Check backgrounds and small details carefully
Don't click randomly - wrong clicks may cost points
Take breaks if your eyes get tired

title: Five-O
description: Five-O puts a numerical twist on the classic crossword board game! Instead of letters, you place number tiles, forming sequences that must add up to multiples of five, with no more than five tiles per sequence. Think strategically, maximize your bonuses, and outscore your opponent in Five-O!

howToPlay: Use mouse or touch controls to interact

controls.mouse: Drag the left mouse button to place the numbered tile.

tips: Take turns placing intersecting number sequences that sum to a multiple of five.
The first sequence must start on the center square, and each new sequence must connect to existing tiles.
Earn points based on the sum of your sequence, plus bonuses from special board squares.
Draw new tiles at the end of your turn, and play continues until no more tiles remain.
The player with the highest score at the end wins, while the opponent loses five points per unplayed tile.

Mix primary colors to create secondary colors
Learn about warm and cool color families

Learn about color relationships and harmonies
Practice identifying different shades and tints
Have fun and be creative with color combinations

title: Galaxy Control: 3D Strategy
description: Galaxy Control: 3D Strategy is a 3D space strategy game that puts you in command of epic battles and interstellar expansion. Build your base, defend your territory, and engage in thrilling conflicts with other players. With its stunning visuals and dynamic gameplay, every decision you make shapes the galaxy's future. Test your strategic skills and conquer the stars!

howToPlay: Build and upgrade your space base
Expand your territory across the galaxy
Engage in strategic combat with other players

controls.mouse: Use the left mouse button to play and interact with the in-game UI
controls.camera: Use the right mouse button to rotate the camera
controls.zoom: Use the mouse wheel to zoom in/out

tips: Focus on building a strong defensive base first
Balance resource production and military expansion
Scout enemy positions before attacking
Upgrade your fleet technologies regularly
Form alliances with other players for mutual benefit

title: Get a Screw 3D Puzzle
description: Get a Screw 3D Puzzle is a mechanical puzzle game where you unscrew and remove bolts in the correct order. Use spatial thinking and problem-solving skills to disassemble complex 3D structures!

howToPlay: Examine the 3D structure to identify moveable screws
Click on screws to unscrew them in the correct order
Clear the way for other screws by removing obstacles
Complete each level by removing all screws

controls.mouse: Click on screws to interact with them, drag to rotate view
controls.touch: Tap screws to unscrew, swipe to rotate on mobile

tips: Rotate the view to see all angles
Look for screws that aren't blocked by other pieces
Work from outside to inside systematically
Some screws may require others to be removed first
Take your time to understand the structure

title: Gravity Crowd
description: Gravity Crowd is a physics-based math game where you control gravity to guide crowds of numbers. Use mathematical thinking to solve puzzles and reach the target!

howToPlay: Gravity Crowd is a thrilling platformer where you guide a stickman that transforms into a growing crowd. Flip gravity with a tap to dodge tricky obstacles, navigate challenging paths, and strategically pass through gates. Every decision shapes the size of your crowd, keeping you on your toes in this fast-paced, dynamic adventure!

controls.mouse: Use the left mouse button or space to change the gravity.

tips: Read the game instructions carefully
Practice to improve your skills

title: Hero Castle War: Tower Attack
description: Hero Castle War: Tower Attack is a 2D action game where you play as Hiro, a ninja trained by master Daiki and his daughter Hana in a secret ninja village. When the vampire king Dakura discovers the village, he kidnaps Hana and leaves his army of corrupted ninjas, giants, dragons, and witches to guard her. Despite the formidable foes, Hiro is determined to rescue Hana. Why did Dakura take Hana? No one knows. Help Hiro reach the highest tower and rescue his beloved now!

howToPlay: Secret ninja skill that can absorb enemy powers
Transform into a higher form of a ninja when having enough powers
All kinds of evil villains: Vampire, Skeleton, Werewolf, Spider, Dragons,...

controls.mouse: Use the left mouse button to play the game.

tips: Read the game instructions carefully
Practice to improve your skills

title: Hextris
description: An addictive puzzle game inspired by Tetris. Rotate the hexagon to match colors and clear blocks before they stack too high!

howToPlay: Rotate the hexagon left or right
Match 3 or more blocks of the same color
Clear blocks before they reach the center

controls.keyboard: Left/Right arrows or A/D to rotate
controls.touch: Swipe left or right to rotate

tips: Plan ahead and watch incoming blocks
Build combos for bonus points
Keep the hexagon balanced

developer: Logan Engstrom, Garrett Finucane, Noah Moroze, Michael Yang

title: Holographic Trends
description: Holographic Trends is a modern fashion and design game that explores futuristic holographic art and fashion trends. Create stunning holographic designs, experiment with iridescent colors, and learn about contemporary digital art techniques!

howToPlay: Design holographic fashion items and accessories
Showcase your designs in virtual fashion shows

controls.mouse: Click and drag to design and customize holographic items
controls.interface: Use the design interface to select colors and patterns

tips: Study real holographic materials for inspiration
Combine multiple colors for realistic iridescent effects
Learn about light reflection and refraction
Experiment with gradients and color transitions
Consider how holographics look from different angles

title: IDLE Molecules
description: IDLE Molecules is an engaging incremental game where you build and manage molecular structures to generate scientific progress. Start with simple atoms and gradually unlock complex molecular compounds while learning about chemistry and molecular biology in an entertaining way!

howToPlay: Begin by generating basic atomic particles
Combine atoms to form simple molecules
Upgrade your molecular generators for better efficiency
Unlock new molecular types and chemical reactions

controls.mouse: Click to generate molecules and purchase upgrades
controls.interface: Use the upgrade menu to improve your molecular production

tips: Invest in automation early to generate molecules while away
Focus on upgrading molecule value before quantity
Unlock new molecular types to access better upgrades
Balance between different types of molecular production
Check back regularly to purchase new upgrades and expansions

title: Idle Research
description: Idle Research is a simulation game where you manage a research laboratory. Hire scientists, fund projects, and make groundbreaking discoveries while learning about the scientific research process!

howToPlay: Build and manage a research laboratory
Wait for research results and breakthroughs
Learn about the scientific research process and methods

controls.mouse: Click to select research projects, drag to allocate resources
controls.touch: Touch to operate interface and manage laboratory

tips: Balance research investment across different fields
Upgrade laboratory equipment to improve efficiency
Pay attention to scientists' professional skills
Allocate research budget wisely
Be patient for major scientific discoveries

title: Little Alchemy 2
description: Little Alchemy 2 is a puzzle game where you combine elements to create new ones. Start with basic elements like air, earth, fire, and water, then discover hundreds of new items through experimentation and logical thinking!

howToPlay: Start with basic elements: air, earth, fire, and water
Drag two elements together to combine them
Observe new elements created and use them for further experiments
Discover new combinations to unlock more complex elements
Explore scientific principles and learn relationships between elements

controls.mouse: Drag elements to combine them, click to view element details
controls.touch: Touch and drag elements, tap to view information

tips: Try combining similar elements together
Think about real-world scientific reactions
Some combinations require creative thinking
Keep track of successful combinations for future use
Don't be afraid to experiment - failure is part of learning

title: Love Colors
description: Love Colors is a romantic color-matching and design game that combines artistic creativity with emotional expression. Create beautiful color combinations, design romantic scenes, and explore how colors can convey feelings and emotions!

howToPlay: Match and combine colors to create romantic scenes
Design beautiful color palettes for different moods
Create artistic compositions with meaningful color choices

controls.mouse: Click to select colors and create designs
controls.design: Drag and drop elements to create scenes

tips: Learn how different colors evoke different emotions
Warm colors (reds, oranges) often feel energetic and passionate
Cool colors (blues, purples) can feel calm and peaceful
Use complementary colors for striking contrasts
Consider color psychology when creating emotional scenes

title: Math Duck
description: Math Duck is a fun educational game featuring a cute duck that helps children learn mathematics. Solve math problems while enjoying adorable duck animations!

howToPlay: Math Duck is a unique and addicting math-puzzle platformer game where you must help the duck to answer the math quiz correctly in the right order. Take the key to the exit door that appears after you answer all the math quizzes, and go to the exit door fast! You only got 10 seconds on each level, so take the quickest route possible.

controls.keyboard: WASD / arrow keys = move

tips: Read the game instructions carefully
Practice to improve your skills

title: Math Expressions
description: Math Expressions is an educational game that teaches students how to solve mathematical expressions and equations. Practice order of operations and algebraic thinking!

howToPlay: MATH EXPRESSions is a WORDLE-inspired game, but instead of finding a word, you need to find a math equation. It's a perfect daily warm-up routine for your brain. On each try, you will get notified if the digit is correct, if the digit is present in the expression but in the wrong place, or if the digit is not present at all. Can you guess the Math Expression in 6 tries?

controls.mouse: Type the math expression on your keyboard or use the left mouse button to interact with the in-game buttons

tips: Read the game instructions carefully
Practice to improve your skills

description: Mini Scientist is an educational game that lets you conduct virtual science experiments. Mix chemicals, observe reactions, and learn scientific principles through hands-on experimentation!

howToPlay: Select scientific instruments in the laboratory
Follow experimental procedures step by step
Observe chemical reactions and physical phenomena
Learn scientific principles and experimental methods

controls.mouse: Click and drag laboratory equipment, operate experimental devices
controls.touch: Touch to select tools, swipe to perform experiments

tips: Read experimental instructions carefully
Follow the correct sequence of experimental steps
Observe detailed changes in experimental phenomena
Try different experimental combinations
Learn safe experimental operation methods

title: Mirror Room Escape
description: Mirror Room Escape is a challenging escape room puzzle where you use mirrors and light reflections to solve puzzles and find your way out. Develop logical thinking and problem-solving skills!

howToPlay: Examine the room for clues and interactive objects
Use mirrors to redirect light beams to targets
Solve puzzles by reflecting light in the correct pattern
Find keys and unlock doors to progress
Escape the room by solving all mirror puzzles

controls.mouse: Click to interact with objects, drag to rotate mirrors
controls.touch: Tap to interact, swipe to adjust mirror angles

tips: Study how light reflects off different surfaces
Experiment with different mirror angles
Look for hidden switches activated by light
Some puzzles require multiple mirrors working together
Take notes of clues and patterns you discover

title: Number Line Match
description: Number Line Match is an educational math game that helps students understand number sequences and patterns. Match numbers to their correct positions on the number line to improve your mathematical skills!

howToPlay: Number Line Match is a puzzle game where you link identical numbers or numbers that add up to 10, forming connections vertically, horizontally, and diagonally to clear them. As you deplete moves, Lines are added, removable only when all their numbers vanish. Be cautious, for a Line on the top row ends the game. Strategic thinking and number pairing are your keys to success.

controls.mouse: Use the left mouse button to drag the number.

tips: Read the game instructions carefully
Practice to improve your skills

title: Numbers Arena
description: Numbers Arena is a math, snake, and merge game altogether in one game. The green number means pluses, the red number means minus, and the yellow x2 is to multiply your number. If your number is higher than your enemies, then you can run up to it to break it. Collect gray numbers enemies drop to grow even more! You will win when you reach the right number. Collect numbers to be the biggest in the arena and smash the rest of your enemies!

howToPlay: Numbers Arena is a math, snake, and merge game altogether in one game. The green number means pluses, the red number means minus, and the yellow x2 is to multiply your number. If your number is higher than your enemies, then you can run up to it to break it. Collect gray numbers enemies drop to grow even more! You will win when you reach the right number. Collect numbers to be the biggest in the arena and smash the rest of your enemies!

controls.mouse: Use the WASD / arrow keys / drag the left mouse button to move around.

tips: Read the game instructions carefully
Practice to improve your skills

title: Nuts & Bolts Puzzle: Sort by Color
description: Nuts & Bolts Puzzle is a satisfying sorting game where you organize colorful nuts and bolts. Use logical thinking and planning skills to sort all pieces by color and complete each challenging level!

howToPlay: Click and drag nuts and bolts to sort them by color
Group all pieces of the same color together
Use empty spaces strategically to move pieces
Complete each level by perfectly organizing all items
Plan your moves carefully to avoid getting stuck

controls.mouse: Click and drag to move nuts and bolts
controls.touch: Touch and drag pieces to sort them on mobile

tips: Start by identifying all available colors
Work on one color at a time for better organization
Use empty spaces as temporary storage
Think several moves ahead before acting
Don't rush - careful planning prevents mistakes

description: Paint by Words combines art and vocabulary! Solve word puzzles to reveal beautiful pictures. Color the artwork by finding the right words!

howToPlay: Solve word puzzles to unlock paint colors
Each correct word reveals part of the picture
Complete all words to finish the artwork
Use different colors based on word categories

controls.mouse: Click to solve word puzzles and paint
controls.keyboard: Type answers to word challenges
controls.touch: Touch interface for mobile devices

tips: Focus on easier words first
Use context clues from the emerging picture
Think about different word categories
Take breaks to appreciate the artwork
Don't rush - enjoy the creative process

title: Parking Jam
description: Parking Jam is a traffic puzzle game where you help cars escape from a crowded parking lot. Use logical thinking and planning to move cars in the right order and clear the jam!

howToPlay: Click and drag cars to move them forward or backward
Cars can only move in the direction they're facing
Clear a path for the target car to reach the exit
Move other cars out of the way strategically
Complete each level with the minimum number of moves

controls.mouse: Click and drag cars to move them
controls.touch: Touch and swipe cars to move them on mobile

tips: Identify which car needs to exit first
Work backwards from the exit to plan moves
Move cars that block multiple others first
Some cars may need to move multiple times
Think step by step to avoid creating new jams

title: Pop a Word
description: Pop a Word is a fun bubble-popping word game! Pop letter bubbles in the correct order to spell words. Combine word skills with bubble-popping fun!

howToPlay: Look at the word you need to spell
Pop letter bubbles in the correct order
Complete words before time runs out
Pop bubbles by clicking or touching them
Earn points for each completed word

controls.mouse: Click on letter bubbles to pop them
controls.touch: Touch bubbles to pop them on mobile devices

tips: Plan your bubble-popping route carefully
Work quickly but accurately
Focus on one word at a time
Watch for falling bubbles
Practice to improve your speed

title: Pottery Master
description: Pottery Master is a relaxing pottery simulation game that teaches traditional ceramic arts. Shape clay on a spinning wheel, design unique pottery pieces, and learn about the ancient art of ceramics while expressing your creativity!

howToPlay: Use the pottery wheel to shape clay into various forms
Control wheel speed and hand pressure for different effects
Paint and decorate your finished pottery pieces
Learn different pottery techniques and styles
Create a collection of unique ceramic artworks

controls.mouse: Use mouse to control pottery wheel and shape clay
controls.click: Click to place hands on clay and apply pressure
controls.drag: Drag to shape and mold the clay

tips: Start with simple shapes like bowls and cups
Keep steady pressure for smooth, even walls
Center the clay properly before shaping
Experiment with different pottery wheel speeds
Take your time - pottery requires patience and practice

title: Punk-O-Matic
description: Punk-O-Matic is a music creation game that lets you compose and perform punk rock music. Create your own punk songs, experiment with different instruments, and learn about music composition and punk rock culture!

howToPlay: Select different punk rock instruments and sounds
Arrange musical patterns to create songs
Experiment with tempo and rhythm variations
Layer multiple instruments for full band sound
Save and share your punk rock compositions

controls.mouse: Click to select instruments and arrange music patterns
controls.interface: Use the music interface to control tempo and volume

tips: Start with simple drum patterns as your foundation
Layer bass lines before adding guitar and vocals
Keep punk songs energetic with fast tempos
Experiment with power chords and simple progressions
Add variety with breaks and dynamic changes

title: Quantum God
description: Quantum God is a fascinating incremental game based on quantum physics and universe expansion theory. Start from the smallest particles and work your way up to creating entire universes! Experience the evolution of matter from quantum level to cosmic scale.

howToPlay: Start by creating basic quantum particles
Combine particles to form atoms and molecules
Build up to larger structures like planets and stars
Unlock new scientific discoveries and technologies
Expand your universe through cosmic evolution

controls.mouse: Click to interact with particles and upgrades
controls.interface: Use the game interface to purchase upgrades and unlock new content

tips: Focus on upgrading particle generation first
Balance between creating new particles and upgrading existing ones
Read the scientific descriptions to learn real physics concepts
Plan your upgrades strategically for maximum efficiency
Experiment with different particle combinations

title: Reacteroids
description: Reacteroids is an open-source browser asteroid game that develops reaction time, spatial awareness, movement planning, and focus through classic arcade gameplay.

howToPlay: Open Reacteroids and start from the game screen.
Use the available keyboard, mouse, or touch controls to complete each challenge.
Focus on reaction time and pattern recognition while improving your score.

controls.keyboard: Use arrow keys, WASD, Enter, Space, or the controls shown in the game.
controls.mouse: Click, drag, or select items inside the game area when supported.
controls.touch: Tap and swipe on mobile devices when the game supports touch input.

tips: Play one practice round before aiming for a high score.
Watch patterns carefully and adjust your strategy after each attempt.
Take short breaks between rounds to keep focus sharp.

title: Skeleton Simulator
description: Skeleton Simulator is an interactive anatomy learning game. Explore the human skeletal system, learn bone names and functions, and understand how our body's framework supports movement and protection!

howToPlay: Explore the 3D model of the human skeletal system
Click on bone parts to learn names and functions
Complete skeleton puzzles and identification challenges
Learn about the relationship between bones and muscles

controls.mouse: Click on bone parts to view information, drag to rotate 3D model
controls.keyboard: Use arrow keys to move view, spacebar to reset view
controls.touch: Touch bones to get information, swipe to rotate model

tips: Start learning from major bones
Pay attention to how bones connect
Learn about the protective functions of bones
Understand bone changes at different ages
Combine with movement to understand bone functions

title: Skribbl.io
description: Skribbl.io is a multiplayer drawing and guessing game that combines artistic skills with social interaction. Draw pictures while others guess what you're drawing, or guess what others are drawing to earn points and improve your artistic communication skills!

howToPlay: Take turns drawing assigned words while others guess
Use simple lines and shapes to communicate ideas
Type your guesses for other players' drawings
Earn points for correct guesses and good drawings
Play with friends or join public rooms

controls.mouse: Use mouse to draw on the canvas
controls.keyboard: Type your guesses in the chat
controls.tools: Select different drawing tools and colors

tips: Start with basic shapes and add details
Think about what makes objects recognizable
Use different colors to clarify your drawings
Draw quickly but clearly for better scores
Pay attention to the number of letters in words

title: Sneaker Art RVF
description: Sneaker Art RVF is a creative fashion design game where you customize and paint sneakers with unique artistic designs. Learn about footwear design, color combinations, and express your personal style through sneaker art!

howToPlay: Choose a sneaker model to customize
Select colors, patterns, and design elements
Paint and decorate different parts of the sneaker
Add logos, text, and artistic elements
Save and showcase your custom sneaker designs

controls.mouse: Click to select colors and paint on sneakers
controls.tools: Use different brushes and design tools
controls.palette: Choose from various color palettes and patterns

tips: Study real sneaker designs for inspiration
Balance colors and patterns for visual appeal
Consider the sneaker's shape when placing designs
Experiment with different artistic styles
Pay attention to symmetry and proportion

title: Stack It
description: Stack It is a fun physics-based puzzle game where you need to stack objects carefully while solving mathematical challenges. Test your spatial reasoning and math skills in this engaging game!

howToPlay: STACK.it is a mesmerizing merging game where you swipe or use arrow keys to create stacks. Watch as smaller stacks leap onto larger ones, triggering explosive-size upgrades when they match. Can you reach the coveted 2048 piece or aim for a colossal 32K? Challenge yourself to orchestrate jaw-dropping 10-stack combos and aim for an astounding 15 merges in a single move. Prepare for an addictive, easy-to-learn, hard-to-master experience that'll keep you stacking for hours on end!

controls.mouse: Drag the left mouse button or use arrow keys to swipe the tiles.

tips: Read the game instructions carefully
Practice to improve your skills

title: Star Battle
description: Star Battle is an open-source space action game that helps students practice timing, resource awareness, reaction speed, and spatial reasoning in a playful science-themed setting.

howToPlay: Open Star Battle and start from the game screen.
Use the available keyboard, mouse, or touch controls to complete each challenge.
Focus on observation and systems thinking while improving your score.

controls.keyboard: Use arrow keys, WASD, Enter, Space, or the controls shown in the game.
controls.mouse: Click, drag, or select items inside the game area when supported.
controls.touch: Tap and swipe on mobile devices when the game supports touch input.

tips: Play one practice round before aiming for a high score.
Watch patterns carefully and adjust your strategy after each attempt.
Take short breaks between rounds to keep focus sharp.

title: Stone Puzzle Games
description: Stone Puzzle Game is a brain-teasing experience that blends three unique puzzle styles into one captivating game. Challenge yourself with "Stone Shoot" by merging number stones, connect colorful stones in "Stone Connect," and test your math skills in "Stone Merge" by combining numbers to form higher values. Engage in a variety of challenges to train your mind and master each puzzle type!

title: Super Number Defense
description: Super Number Defense is a tower defense game with mathematical elements. Use numbers and calculations to defend your base against waves of enemies!

howToPlay: Super Number Defense is a tower defense game where you can put your calculation skills to the test! Strategically defeat waves of enemies by harnessing the power of math. Choose your turrets wisely, as their strength and effectiveness depend on your ability to solve simple math problems. Allocate your resources wisely to maximize your defense capabilities. With its innovative blend of tower defense and math gameplay, this game offers a thrilling and educational gaming experience. Can you protect your base? It's time to unleash the power of numbers!

controls.mouse: Use the left mouse button to place and upgrade the turrets.

tips: Read the game instructions carefully
Practice to improve your skills

description: Table Tennis World Tour is an exciting ping pong game! Travel around the world, compete in tournaments, and become the ultimate table tennis champion!

Aim for different areas of the table to challenge your opponent
Win matches to progress through the world tour
Earn points and unlock new locations
Master different shot types and strategies

controls.mouse: Move mouse to control paddle position and swing
controls.touch: Touch and drag to control paddle on mobile

tips: Watch your opponent's paddle position
Vary your shot placement and speed
Use spin shots to confuse opponents
Practice timing for consistent returns
Stay focused during long rallies

title: Tetr.js
description: Tetr.js is an open-source falling-block puzzle game that builds spatial reasoning, planning, pattern recognition, and quick decision-making skills.

howToPlay: Open Tetr.Js and start from the game screen.
Use the available keyboard, mouse, or touch controls to complete each challenge.
Focus on computational thinking while improving your score.

controls.keyboard: Use arrow keys, WASD, Enter, Space, or the controls shown in the game.
controls.mouse: Click, drag, or select items inside the game area when supported.
controls.touch: Tap and swipe on mobile devices when the game supports touch input.

tips: Play one practice round before aiming for a high score.
Watch patterns carefully and adjust your strategy after each attempt.
Take short breaks between rounds to keep focus sharp.

title: The Last Light of Lyra
description: The Last Light of Lyra is an adventure game with mathematical puzzles. Help Lyra solve numerical challenges to restore light to her world in this epic quest!

howToPlay: The Last Light of Lyra is a serene cosmic puzzle adventure where you guide mining ships through a collapsing universe. Traverse fading planets, solve clever number-based puzzles using addition and subtraction, and restore harmony among the stars. With gentle storytelling and dreamlike visuals, it's a peaceful, brain-teasing journey through a beautifully unraveling cosmos.

controls.general: Drag and drop to create a line to move ships between planets.

tips: Read the game instructions carefully
Practice to improve your skills

title: Top Down Adventure
description: Top Down Adventure is an open-source exploration game where students practice navigation, spatial awareness, resource tracking, and careful movement in a pixel-art world.

howToPlay: Open Top Down React Phaser Game and start from the game screen.
Use the available keyboard, mouse, or touch controls to complete each challenge.
Focus on reaction time and pattern recognition while improving your score.

controls.keyboard: Use arrow keys, WASD, Enter, Space, or the controls shown in the game.
controls.mouse: Click, drag, or select items inside the game area when supported.
controls.touch: Tap and swipe on mobile devices when the game supports touch input.

tips: Play one practice round before aiming for a high score.
Watch patterns carefully and adjust your strategy after each attempt.
Take short breaks between rounds to keep focus sharp.

title: Twisted Tangle
description: Twisted Tangle is a mind-bending puzzle game where you untangle twisted ropes and chains. Develop spatial reasoning and problem-solving skills as you work through increasingly complex tangles!

howToPlay: Examine the tangled ropes and chains
Click and drag rope segments to untangle them
Rotate and move pieces to find the solution
Work systematically to avoid creating new tangles
Clear all tangles to complete each level

controls.mouse: Click and drag rope segments, scroll to zoom
controls.touch: Touch and drag to move ropes, pinch to zoom on mobile

tips: Start with the most obvious tangles first
Rotate your view to see from different angles
Follow one rope from end to end
Be patient - rushing creates more tangles
Look for loops and work to straighten them

title: Way Of Life
description: Way of Life is an open-source Conway Game of Life simulation where students explore cellular automata, emergence, patterns, and simple rules creating complex systems.

howToPlay: Open Way Of Life and start from the game screen.
Use the available keyboard, mouse, or touch controls to complete each challenge.
Focus on computational thinking while improving your score.

controls.keyboard: Use arrow keys, WASD, Enter, Space, or the controls shown in the game.
controls.mouse: Click, drag, or select items inside the game area when supported.
controls.touch: Tap and swipe on mobile devices when the game supports touch input.

tips: Play one practice round before aiming for a high score.
Watch patterns carefully and adjust your strategy after each attempt.
Take short breaks between rounds to keep focus sharp.

title: Wodr
description: Wodr is a Wordle-inspired word guessing game! Guess the hidden word in 6 attempts using clues from your previous guesses. Perfect for vocabulary building!

howToPlay: Check the color feedback for each letter
Green means correct letter in correct position
Yellow means correct letter in wrong position
Gray means letter is not in the word

controls.keyboard: Type your word guesses
controls.mouse: Click on virtual keyboard if available
controls.touch: Use on-screen keyboard on mobile

tips: Start with words containing common vowels
Use elimination strategy based on feedback
Try words with common consonants
Pay attention to letter positioning
Think of different word categories

title: Wood Screw Bolts Puzzle
description: Wood Screw Bolts Puzzle is a mechanical puzzle game where you remove screws and bolts from wooden structures. Learn about construction and engineering while solving challenging puzzles!

howToPlay: Examine the wooden structure and identify removable screws
Click on screws to unscrew them in the correct sequence
Remove wooden pieces as screws are taken out
Clear all screws and disassemble the structure
Use logical thinking to determine the correct order

controls.mouse: Click on screws to remove them, drag to rotate view
controls.touch: Tap screws to unscrew, swipe to change perspective

tips: Look for screws that aren't supporting other pieces
Remove edge pieces before interior ones
Some screws may be hidden behind wooden boards
Work systematically from one side to the other
Understand how the pieces fit together

title: Word String Puzzle
description: Word String Puzzle is an innovative word game! Connect letters with strings to form words and complete challenging puzzles. Exercise your brain with this unique twist on word games.

howToPlay: Connect letters by drawing lines between them
Form words by connecting letters in the correct order
Complete all the required words to finish the level

controls.mouse: Click and drag to draw strings between letters
controls.touch: Touch and drag to connect letters on mobile

tips: Start with the longest words first
Plan your string paths to avoid crossing
Look for letters that appear in multiple words
Use the undo button if you make mistakes
Think about letter positioning before connecting

title: Words of Wonders
description: Words of Wonders is an exciting word puzzle game that combines crossword and word search elements. Explore famous landmarks while solving challenging word puzzles!

howToPlay: Swipe letters to form words in the correct order
Fill in the crossword grid with the words you create
Use all available letters to complete each level
Discover hidden bonus words for extra points
Travel through different landmarks as you progress

controls.mouse: Click and drag to connect letters and form words
controls.touch: Swipe to connect letters on mobile devices

tips: Start with shorter words to get letter hints
Look for common word endings like -ING, -ED, -ER
Try different letter combinations systematically
Find bonus words for extra coins and hints
Use hints when stuck on difficult levels
